lines.english: Only a few, as Gurmukh, remembered the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਇ ਪਗ ਧਰਮੁ ਧਰੇ ਧਰਣੀਧਰ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਾਚੁ ਤਿਥਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: due pag dharam dhare dharaneedhar guramukh saach tithaaee he |8|
lines.english: Dharmic faith, which upholds and supports the earth, had only two feet; Truth was revealed to the Gurmukhs. ||8||
The kings acted righteously only out of self-interest.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮ ਬਿਨੁ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਨ ਹੋਈ ਥਾਕੇ ਕਰਮ ਕਮਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: raam naam bin mukat na hoee thaake karam kamaaee he |9|
lines.english: Without the Lord's Name, liberation did not come, although they grew weary of performing rituals. ||9||
Tied to hopes of reward, they gave to charities.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਗੁਰਸਬਦੈ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਨ ਹੋਈ ਪਰਪੰਚੁ ਕਰਿ ਭਰਮਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: bin gurasabadai mukat na hoee parapanch kar bharamaaee he |10|
lines.english: Without the Word of the Guru's Shabad, liberation is not obtained; practicing hypocrisy, they wander around confused. ||10||
but the treasure of liberation comes only by praising the Shabad.
Practicing religious rituals, they sought liberation,
Love and attachment to Maya cannot be abandoned.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਹਿਨਿਸਿ ਭਗਤਿ ਰਤੇ ਵੀਚਾਰੀ ਠਾਕੁਰ ਸਿਉ ਬਣਿ ਆਈ ਹੇ ॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: ahinis bhagat rate veechaaree tthaakur siau ban aaee he |11|
lines.english: Day and night, the devotees remain imbued with contemplative meditation; they become just like their Lord and Master. ||11||
They alone find release, who practice deeds of Truth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਿ ਜਪ ਤਪ ਕਰਿ ਕਰਿ ਤੀਰਥ ਨਾਵਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: eik jap tap kar kar teerath naaveh |
lines.english: Some chant and practice intensive meditation, and take cleansing baths at sacred shrines of pilgrimage.
They walk as You will them to walk.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਠਿ ਨਿਗ੍ਰਹਿ ਅਪਤੀਜੁ ਨ ਭੀਜੈ ਬਿਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਰ ਕਿਨਿ ਪਤਿ ਪਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: hatth nigreh apateej na bheejai bin har gur kin pat paaee he |12|
lines.english: By stubborn rituals of self-suppression, the Lord is not pleased. No one has ever obtained honor, without the Lord, without the Guru. ||12||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਲੀ ਕਾਲ ਮਹਿ ਇਕ ਕਲ ਰਾਖੀ ॥
lines.translit: kalee kaal meh ik kal raakhee |
lines.english: In the Iron Age, the Dark Age of Kali Yuga, only one power remains.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਗੁਰ ਪੂਰੇ ਕਿਨੈ ਨ ਭਾਖੀ ॥
lines.translit: bin gur poore kinai na bhaakhee |
lines.english: Without the Perfect Guru, no one has even described it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖਿ ਕੂੜੁ ਵਰਤੈ ਵਰਤਾਰਾ ਬਿਨੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਭਰਮੁ ਨ ਜਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: manamukh koorr varatai varataaraa bin satigur bharam na jaaee he |13|
lines.english: The self-willed manmukhs have staged the show of falsehood. Without the True Guru, doubt does not depart. ||13||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਤਿਸੁ ਸੇਵੇ ਸੋ ਅਬਿਨਾਸੀ ਨਾ ਤਿਸੁ ਕਾਲੁ ਸੰਤਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: jo tis seve so abinaasee naa tis kaal santaaee he |14|
lines.english: Whoever serves Him becomes immortal and imperishable, and will not be tortured by death. ||14||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾ ਜਮ ਕਾਣਿ ਨ ਛੰਦਾ ਬੰਦਾ ॥
lines.translit: naa jam kaan na chhandaa bandaa |
lines.english: He does not fear death, and He is not dependent on mortal men.
The True Guru is the Creator Lord, independent and carefree.
The Gurmukh saves countless millions.
The Creator Lord has enshrined Himself within the Guru.
Everyone begs from the Guru, God's Treasurer.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਬ ਜੀਆ ਜਗਜੀਵਨੁ ਦਾਤਾ ਨਿਰਭਉ ਮੈਲੁ ਨ ਕਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੧੫॥
lines.translit: sarab jeea jagajeevan daataa nirbhau mail na kaaee he |15|
lines.english: The Life of the World is the Great Giver of all beings. The Fearless Lord has no filth at all. ||15||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕੁ ਸਾਚੁ ਕਹੈ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਜਾਚੈ ਮੈ ਦੀਜੈ ਸਾਚੁ ਰਜਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੧੬॥੪॥
lines.translit: naanak saach kahai prabh jaachai mai deejai saach rajaaee he |16|4|
lines.english: Nanak speaks the Truth; he begs from God. Please bless me with the Truth, by Your Will. ||16||4||
He Himself is the immaculate, unknowable, infinite Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤ੍ਰਿਭਵਣ ਜੋਤਿ ਧਰੀ ਪਰਮੇਸਰਿ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਦੂਜਾ ਭਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: tribhavan jot dharee paramesar avar na doojaa bhaaee he |1|
lines.english: The Light of the Transcendent Lord pervades the three worlds; there is no other at all, O Siblings of Destiny. ||1||
The True Lord unites with those who are united with the Word of the Shabad.
When it pleases Him, we intuitively merge with Him.
Maaroo, First Mehl:
He is unknowable and mysterious; He is pleased by the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਕੇ ਚਾਕਰ ਤਿਸ ਕੀ ਸੇਵਾ ॥
lines.translit: jis ke chaakar tis kee sevaa |
lines.english: I am His servant; I serve Him.
The false ones receive, and then deny having received.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਗਤਾ ਕਾ ਗੁਣਕਾਰੀ ਕਰਤਾ ਬਖਸਿ ਲਏ ਵਡਿਆਈ ਹੇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: bhagataa kaa gunakaaree karataa bakhas le vaddiaaee he |2|
lines.english: The Creator is the Benefactor of His devotees. He forgives them - such is His greatness. ||2||
The True Lord gives and gives; His blessings never run short.
Following the Guru's Teachings, they know the Love of the True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੂਲੁ ਨ ਬੂਝਹਿ ਸਾਚਿ ਨ ਰੀਝਹਿ ਦੂਜੈ ਭਰਮਿ ਭੁਲਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: mool na boojheh saach na reejheh doojai bharam bhulaaee he |3|
lines.english: They do not understand their origins, they are not pleased with the Truth, and so they wander in duality and doubt. ||3||
The Gurmukhs remain awake and aware, day and night.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖ ਸੋਇ ਰਹੇ ਸੇ ਲੂਟੇ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਾਬਤੁ ਭਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: manamukh soe rahe se lootte guramukh saabat bhaaee he |4|
lines.english: The self-willed manmukhs remain asleep, and are plundered. The Gurmukhs remain safe and sound, O Siblings of Destiny. ||4||
The false come, and the false go;

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦਿ ਮਿਲੇ ਸੇ ਦਰਗਹ ਪੈਧੇ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸੁਰਤਿ ਸਮਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: sabad mile se daragah paidhe guramukh surat samaaee he |5|
lines.english: Those who are imbued with the Shabad are robed in honor in the Court of the Lord; the Gurmukhs focus their consciousness on Him. ||5||
imbued with falsehood, they practice only falsehood.
The false are cheated, and robbed by the robbers.
The garden is laid waste, like the rough wilderness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮ ਬਿਨਾ ਕਿਛੁ ਸਾਦਿ ਨ ਲਾਗੈ ਹਰਿ ਬਿਸਰਿਐ ਦੁਖੁ ਪਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: naam binaa kichh saad na laagai har bisariai dukh paaee he |6|
lines.english: Without the Naam, the Name of the Lord, nothing tastes sweet; forgetting the Lord, they suffer in sorrow. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਚੀਨੈ ਆਪੁ ਪਛਾਣੈ ਸੋਈ ਜੋਤੀ ਜੋਤਿ ਮਿਲਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: cheenai aap pachhaanai soee jotee jot milaaee he |7|
lines.english: One who understands his own self, realizes the Lord. His light merges into the Light. ||7||
True is the glorious greatness of the jewel of the Name.
Receiving the food of Truth, one is satisfied.
